title: Nauclea setiloba
taxonomy: Nauclea setiloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of tree that is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The classification of Nauclea setiloba places it within the genus Nauclea, which is a group of plants that are commonly found in tropical regions. Nauclea setiloba is closely related to other species within the Rubiaceae family, such as the genus Nauclea's closest relative, the genus Mitragyna. The exact classification of Nauclea setiloba is further defined by its unique characteristics and genetic makeup.
